description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa upholstered in a solid blue fabric. The sofa features two seat cushions and two back cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be attached. The armrests are straight, squared, and of equal height to the backrest, giving the sofa a clean, boxy silhouette. The legs are short, slightly tapered, and positioned at the corners, with a dark finish that contrasts subtly with the upholstery. The backrest is straight and continuous, matching the height of the armrests and providing a cohesive, minimalist look. The upholstery is smooth and unpatterned, contributing to the sofa's contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern blue two-seater sofa with straight armrests, uniform cushions, and short, dark corner legs. The design is minimalist with smooth, solid upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view shows two uniform seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's overall boxy shape.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the straight, squared armrest and the sofa's compact depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, unadorned backrest and the sofa's clean lines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the straight armrest and the sofa's slim profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two uniform seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, squared armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, slightly tapered legs at the corners, dark in color, with a simple exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at medium height, matching the armrests, with attached cushions and no tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
